title.en: Then it was not a battle, but a massacre.

content.en:
As Yan Ancestor and Xuan Hu Dao Ancestor admit defeat, the Five Great Dao Ancestors were all defeated at Ye Tian's hands.

According to their promises, these five Supreme Dao Ancestors must give up preventing Ye Tian from refining the Forbidden Void Realm, and without these five Supreme Dao Ancestors, would other Supreme Dao Ancestors dare to make a move against Ye Tian?

They also took a look at the battle just now, if they played, they would definitely be easily killed by Ye Tian.

Then it was not a battle, but a massacre.

Whoa!!

A supreme strong Dao Ancestor left here, no longer stopping Ye Tian, he had already given up, and let Ye Tian refine this forbidden void realm.

And in the distance, those onlookers were also suppressed by Ye Tian's combat power.

"The Dark King of Black Wind Mountain is inevitably too terrifying, Yan Ancestor, Xuanhu Dao Ancestor, Heavenly Scale Dao Ancestor, Heavenless Dao Ancestor, Kunxing Dao Ancestor, these five supreme Dao Ancestors are almost the legendary existence of the vast sea realm, they are all invincible levels in the strongest Dao Ancestor level, and they have even escaped their lives from the hands of the Invincible Dao Ancestor, I didn't expect that joining forces is not the opponent of the Dark King, and their strength is probably comparable to the weaker Invincible Dao Ancestor!"

"It's not just comparable to the Invincible Dao Ancestor, his stealth method is too clever, even these five Supreme Dao Ancestors can't detect it, I'm afraid the Invincible Dao Ancestor may not be able to detect it, what kind of Supreme Dao Technique is this?"

"I'm afraid it's not the Supreme Dao Technique, but the Forbidden Dao Technique!"

"Oh my God, another forbidden Dao technique, the Dark King's talent is too terrifying, he actually comprehended two forbidden Dao techniques at the level of the strongest Dao Ancestor. "

"Someone said before that the Dark King was the previous Nine Extremes Heavenly King, but I didn't believe it at all, and now I don't believe it even more! The Nine Extremes Heavenly King has no background at all and has a top-level forbidden treasure, and no matter how high the talent of the Nine Extremes Heavenly King is, it is impossible to create two forbidden Dao techniques in such a short time. Creating a Forbidden Dao Technique is not a matter of talent at all, but a matter of time, you must have a long time and a deep understanding of the Forbidden Dao before you can create it before the Half-Step Domain Ancestor, this is what a certain Half-Step Domain Ancestor said!"

"I also don't think the Dark King is the Nine Extremes Heavenly King. The Nine Extremes Heavenly King may have been promoted to the Supreme Dao Ancestor and become one of the Ten Kings, but it is estimated that it is hidden, and Black Wind Mountain has often done this in history, so people think that Black Wind Mountain only has ten kings, but who would have thought that they have so many Supreme Dao Ancestors, Invincible Dao Ancestors, and even half-step domain ancestors!"

"The Dark King may be an incomparably ancient supreme Dao Ancestor, and now he has been pushed to the position of the Dark King, I didn't expect the Black Wind Mountain to hide so deeply!"

......

These Dao Ancestors did not continue to watch, but dispersed one by one, continuing to look for forbidden curiosities and forbidden treasures.

Fighting for the Forbidden Void Realm, they had no hope, so they could only try to find some forbidden curiosities and forbidden treasures.

Of course, the Heavenly Emperor Palace's supreme Dao Ancestors had left the Forbidden Void Realm, and they were also afraid that after Ye Tian refined the Forbidden Void Realm, they would suddenly kill them, although this possibility was not very likely, they did not dare to bet.

However, the supreme Dao Ancestors of the three Nine Heavens forces did not leave much, and there were still many people who were willing to stay here and continue to search for forbidden strange things, until the Forbidden Void Realm was completely refined by Ye Tian, and then expelled them.

"You continue to guard this place and don't let anyone else disturb me, can you do it?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!"

There are many supreme Dao ancestors in Black Wind Mountain.

At this moment, they were completely convinced, and they really recognized Ye Tian's position as the leader.

And Nirvana Dao Ancestor also lowered his head, and he was also convinced.

Originally, he was a little unconvinced that Ye Tian, the new Dark King, had become the team leader, but he naturally would not disobey Black Wind Mountain's order.

But deep down, he thought that Ye Tian's strength was at most the top Supreme Dao Ancestor.

But he never expected that Ye Tian would actually beat Yan Zu and them, and even he didn't have any hope of winning against Shang Yan Zu, at most he could barely compete with one or two.

In terms of strength, Ye Tian could easily crush him, or even kill him.

The Black Wind Mountain Dao Ancestors protected Ye Tian to prevent other Supreme Dao Ancestors from disturbing Ye Tian, and some Supreme Dao Ancestors saw so many Supreme Dao Ancestors here, even if they didn't know about Ye Tian vs. Yan Ancestor and the other five Supreme Dao Ancestors, they would definitely not dare to come and spread wild.

In this way, time passed little by little, and Ye Tian slowly refined the Forbidden Void Realm with the help of the Town Boundary Monument.

Ten days later.

Boom!

The Forbidden Void Realm shook, and the rules began to protect the entire Forbidden Void Realm, and gradually disappeared in the void of the Mysterious Void Ancient Realm, and there was no trace of it anymore.

The powerhouses of many big forces knew that the Forbidden Void Realm had been refined by Ye Tian.

Whoa!!

A supreme strong Dao Ancestor was moved out of the Forbidden Void Realm by Ye Tian, except for the Supreme Dao Ancestor of Black Wind Mountain, there was no other Supreme Dao Ancestor in the Forbidden Void Realm, even if he hid deeply, he couldn't hide it from Ye Tian.

--------------

For the first time, the news of Ye Tian's refining of the Forbidden Void Realm reached the major bases of the Dark Forbidden Realm.

Black Wind Mountain Base.

The Eternal Dao Ancestor was overjoyed when he learned of the battle situation in the Forbidden Void Realm.

"Hahaha, the Dark King is so good, I didn't expect him to single-handedly crush the five strongest Dao Ancestors, Yan Ancestor and Xuanhu Dao Ancestor, and he can almost be called the first strongest Dao Ancestor in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm today!"

The Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor was also full of joy, and said slightly: "I thought that the strength of the Dark King would be comparable to that of the Nirvana Dao Ancestor at most, but I didn't expect him to far exceed my expectations, it seems that he usually hides from us!"

"It's normal to hide strength, who would easily expose all of their strength?" Eternal Dao Ancestor said with a smile: "This time the Dark King successfully seized the Forbidden Void Realm, although this time it is the Black Wind Mountain operation, but we must also give the Dark King enough benefits, otherwise he will be a little unhappy!"

"In this way, the authority of the Forbidden Void Realm, he can control half of it, and he can control eighty percent of the forbidden curiosities and forbidden treasures he has harvested, and he only needs to hand over two percent. "

Shenxu Dao Ancestor proposed.

"That's okay!" Eternal Dao Ancestor nodded, "If you don't take into account the feelings of other Supreme Dao Ancestors, otherwise you won't be able to hand over Forbidden Strange Objects and Forbidden Treasures, then it's nothing!"

Immediately.

The Eternal Dao Ancestor and the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor took the time to return to the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, personally entered the Forbidden Void Realm, and completed the transfer of authority with Ye Tian.

Ye Tian retained half of the permissions, and the Eternal Dao Ancestor and the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor obtained the other half of the permissions.

In addition, they also created some permission tokens, which contained a trace of authority power, which allowed the Dao Ancestors of Black Wind Mountain to freely enter and exit the Forbidden Void Realm.

Moreover, they named this forbidden Void Realm the Void Realm in the name of the Dark King!
